ENFRIT
Donate
Serve with us

Volunteer in parish life at Sainte-Angèle

Volunteers help support parish life, community events, fundraising activities, liturgical celebrations, choir and music, and the practical needs of Sainte-Angèle Parish.

Contact Maria Pia
Volunteer opportunities

Ways to help in the parish

Discover some of the practical ways volunteers help support worship, community life, and parish activities.

Seasonal and ongoing

Event and fundraiser support

Help prepare and support parish events, fundraising activities, and special community gatherings throughout the year.

A practical role for volunteers who enjoy helping behind the scenes.

Weekly or seasonal

Choir and music

Support liturgical celebrations, feast days, and parish gatherings through singing, music, and choir service.

Welcoming to experienced musicians and new volunteers alike.

Scheduled rotation

Altar and liturgy support

Assist with altar preparation, readings, prayer, and other practical needs connected to parish liturgies and celebrations.

A thoughtful way to serve the prayer life of the parish.

Flexible

Hospitality and parish gatherings

Help welcome parishioners, organize refreshments, and support parish dinners, receptions, and community gatherings.

Well suited for warm and dependable helpers.

Monthly

Community support

Offer practical support for parish needs, charitable efforts, and activities that strengthen the wider community.

A meaningful opportunity for service-minded parishioners.

Volunteer Coordinator

Volunteer Coordinator

Interested in volunteering with Sainte-Angèle Parish? Volunteers help with parish events, community dinners, fundraising activities, hospitality, and other community initiatives throughout the year. Contact Maria Pia DeLuca for more information and current volunteer opportunities.

Volunteer Coordinator

Maria Pia DeLuca

Phone

514-323-9092

Languages

French, Italian

Église Sainte-Angèle

Église Sainte-Angèle is a warm Roman Catholic parish in Saint-Léonard where worship, prayer, and community life are shared in a calm and welcoming atmosphere.

5275 Boulevard Lavoisier, Montréal, Québec

Contact

514-321-3644
